attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.COMPETENCE_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.NAME, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.DATE_FROM, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.DATE_TO, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.BEHAVIOURAL_INDICATOR, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.CERTIFICATION_REQUIRED, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.MIN_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.RATING_SCALE_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.COMPETENCE_ALIAS, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.COMPETENCE_CLUSTER, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.UNIT_STANDARD_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.CREDIT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.CREDITS, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.LEVEL_TYPE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.LEVEL_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.FIELD, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.SUB_FIELD, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.PROVIDER, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.QA_ORGANIZATION, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION1, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION2, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION3, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION4, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION5, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION6, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION7, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION8, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION9, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION10, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION11, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION12, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.INFORMATION13, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES,
 (
 select COMPETENCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES
 minus
 select COMPETENCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCES
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.COMPETENCE_ID = STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.COMPETENCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCES.REFRESH_DATETIME
